Job-Ready Certificate Program New Batches Run Every Month

Smart Banker Program

A specialized program designed for fresh graduates and postgraduates to prepare them as 'Smart Bankers' for leading private sector banks.

Home / Courses / Smart Banker Program

Program Details

Quick overview of the Smart Banker Program training features and entry criteria.

Salary Package

₹ 2.4 - 3.5 LPA

Training Duration

3 Months

Training Mode

Online Mode

Eligibility

Graduation (Min 50%)

Programme Highlights

Key features that make the Smart Banker Program India's most preferred job-ready banking program.

  • Senior Ex-Bankers as Faculty
  • NSDC Approved Training Partner
  • Resume & Interview Preparation
  • 100% Placement Assistance
  • Professional Communication Skills
  • Advanced MS Excel Training
  • Core Banking Solutions (Finacle)
  • Interactive Live Online Classes
  • Corporate Personality Development
  • NISM Series V-A MF Exam Prep
  • Starting Salary of ₹ 2.4 - 3.6 LPA
  • Practical Banking Roleplays & Simulations

Career Progression after Smart Banker Program

A clear visual roadmap of how your retail banking career scales after graduation.

01

Entry Level Role

Officer / Teller / Back Office Executive / Welcome Desk Representative

₹ 2.4 - 3.5 LPA
02

Next Level (1 - 3 Years)

Deputy Manager / Assistant Branch Manager / Customer Service Manager

₹ 4.0 - 6.0 LPA
03

Management Level (3 - 5 Years)

Branch Manager (Responsible for Liabilities & Branch Profitability)

₹ 7.0 - 10.0 LPA
04

Senior Leadership (5 - 10 Years)

Regional Head / Cluster Head (Overseeing Multi-branch Locations)

₹ 12.0 - 18.0 LPA+

Admission Process

Four simple steps to join the Smart Banker Program and secure your corporate role.

1
Fill Application
Fill our simple online form or visit a TrueKnack counseling center.
2
Submit Documents
Attach your academic files (10th, 12th & Graduation transcripts).
3
Application Review
Our screening panel reviews your eligibility and age criteria.
4
Pay Fees & Begin
Submit your training fees upon approval to block your batch seat.

Smart Banker Program Fee Structure

Flexible funding models designed to keep banking training accessible.

Total Program Fee

₹ 69,900

Inclusive of all study resources, certifications, NISM prep kits, and placement mock panels.

Installment Structure

• Installment I: ₹ 23,300

• Installment II: ₹ 23,300

• Installment III: ₹ 23,300

0% Interest Loan Options Available!

Modern Teaching Pedagogies

How we train you: Hands-on learning systems led by senior ex-bankers.

Group Discussions

Participate in interactive sessions to boost communication and analytical banking thinking.

Branch Visits

Practical study trips to understand live teller counters, customer service desks, and compliance protocols.

Problem Solving

Work on case-based business scenarios to build quick critical thinking and operational logic.

Gaming & Quizzes

Interactive learning games to memorize banking codes, interest rates, and compliance rules easily.

Role Playing

Practice account opening, service resolution, and sales pitches under real simulated pressures.

Mock Interviews

Frequent mock panels led by ex-HR managers to prepare you completely for private bank hiring drives.

Frequently Asked Questions

Frequently asked questions about the Smart Banker Program.

Smart Banker Program is a job-oriented program designed to prepare graduates for careers in banking operations, branch sales, and customer relationship management.
Graduates or postgraduates from any stream aged between 21-27 years with minimum 50% marks in 10th, 12th & Graduation are eligible.
The program is delivered via live online interactive classes led by veteran ex-banker faculty, allowing you to study comfortably from home.
Yes! TrueKnack provides 100% placement support, matching you with recruitment drives at leading private banks.

Ready to Start Your Banking Career?

Apply directly through our specialized program admission portal to secure your seat.

Enquire Now
